screens.name: projects/2612650212901166198/screens/960f15cb8584437f967bf458cb66cb0f
screens.title: A grid of four high-fidelity dashboard screenshots for a SaaS product. 1. Revenue Forecast with line charts. 2. Inventory Health with status badges. 3. SKU Demand Forecast with heatmaps. 4. Operational Planning with gantt-style bars. All in dark mode, matching #07111F and #0C1727 colors. Professional, clean, Geist Sans font.

screens.name: projects/2612650212901166198/screens/3e1c4d67e6c34fdbbd8e0f0b09a6eb00
screens.title: A clean, professional 3D dashboard visualization for an ecommerce decision intelligence platform. Dark mode UI, Geist Sans typography. Three panels in a perspective fan layout: a central 'Weekly Planning Dashboard' with bar charts and line graphs, flanked by a 'Executive Decision Dashboard' and a 'Scenario Planning Dashboard'. High-fidelity, premium SaaS aesthetic, deep navy background with subtle blue radial glow. No realistic people, just UI components.
